contract: TypeDuck TSF typing client proof obligations

raw_comment_sample.phase_4_rule: preserve raw bytes at current candidate comment position; do not parse into Phase 5 dictionary fields

runtime_cases.trigger: type ordinary Cantonese input into a Windows text field
runtime_cases.expected: composition, candidates, candidate cursor, comments, and commit apply from backend response within bounded key-path wait
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe records key response timing below the Phase 4 threshold and captures returned composition/candidate state.

runtime_cases.trigger: typing path cannot connect to the launcher
runtime_cases.expected: client enters degraded state promptly and does not run the old repeated three-second connection loop
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe disables launcher and records fast failed key handling plus reset state.

runtime_cases.trigger: launcher or backend returns malformed framed protobuf to the TSF client
runtime_cases.expected: client closes pipe, clears async queue, resets candidates/composition, and can reconnect later
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe injects malformed response and records reset plus later reconnect.

runtime_cases.trigger: launcher returns TypeDuck backend restart/degraded health response
runtime_cases.expected: client clears visible typing state, returns promptly, and allows later reconnect
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe forces backend restart and records bounded degraded reset.

runtime_cases.trigger: backend returns CandidateEntry.comment/raw_lookup_comment containing \u000b, \u000c, and \r separators
runtime_cases.expected: candidate comment shown/passed at current comment position with separators intact
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe compares escaped output and SHA-256 of raw comment payload.

runtime_cases.trigger: user presses reverse lookup key sequence supported by backend
runtime_cases.expected: frontend forwards normal key event data and renders only backend-returned state
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe records key request fields and confirms no frontend reverse-lookup special casing.

runtime_cases.trigger: user presses Cangjie Version 3 or 5 related key sequence supported by backend
runtime_cases.expected: frontend forwards normal key event data and renders only backend-returned state
runtime_cases.plan_04_04_proof: Probe records key request fields and confirms no frontend Cangjie special casing.
